items.title: feat(discord): release -> #announcements auto-post + pin + GitHub Discussions (#2201)
items.snippet: On a published GitHub release, post the notes to the ECC Discord #announcements channel (via bot), pin it, and cross-post to GitHub Discussions (Announcements category). Release data flows through env vars (no shell interpolation of untrusted input). Secrets: DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN, DISCORD_ANNOUNCE_CHAN

items.title: fix: make plugin hooks run on Node 21+ and green the suite under modern Node (#2184)
items.snippet: ROOT CAUSE: hooks load plugin-hook-bootstrap.js via `node -e "...; process.argv.splice(1,0,s); require(s)"`. On Node 21+, require.main is `undefined` under --eval, so the `if (require.main === module)` guard was false and main() never ran — every plugin hook silently no-op'd (e.g. the MCP-health Pre

items.title: fix(hooks): use shared renameWithRetry in writeWarnState (ecc-context-monitor)
items.snippet: Mirror the previous commit's Windows-EPERM retry on the companion `writeWarnState` in `scripts/hooks/ecc-context-monitor.js`. Same race: two PostToolUse subprocesses writing concurrent debounce state racing on `MoveFileExW`, target-in-use throwing EPERM on Windows even though each writer's tmp path

items.title: fix(lib): retry rename on Windows EPERM/EACCES/EBUSY in writeBridgeAtomic
items.snippet: PR #1983 round 1 introduced unique-suffix tmp paths so two concurrent writers no longer share a single `.tmp` file. That fix is correct under POSIX semantics — `rename(2)` is atomic between source and destination, so each writer renames onto the same target without conflict.  Windows `MoveFileExW` i

items.title: test(lib): concurrent writeBridgeAtomic + tmp-cleanup regression
items.snippet: Two regression tests pin down the previous two commits' atomic-rename fixes:  1. **concurrent writes don't throw ENOENT or corrupt the file** —    spawns two child Node processes (`tests/__tmp_bridge_writer.js`    created in-test, cleaned up in finally) that each call    `writeBridgeAtomic(sid, …)`

items.title: fix(hooks): use unique tmp suffix in writeWarnState (ecc-context-monitor)
items.snippet: Mirror the previous commit's `writeBridgeAtomic` fix on the companion `writeWarnState` in `ecc-context-monitor.js`. Same shape: fixed `${target}.tmp` → `${target}.${process.pid}.${randomNonce}.tmp`, plus best-effort cleanup of the tmp file on `renameSync` failure (throws original error after cleanup
